description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian with a modern urban appearance, featuring a high ponytail hairstyle and a distinctive face mask covering the lower half of the face. The individual is dressed in a loose, hooded sweatshirt layered over a t-shirt, with cropped jogger pants and fingerless gloves. A prominent crossbody bag with visible straps and buckles is slung across the torso, and a utility pouch is attached to the waist. The footwear consists of high-top sneakers, and the overall outfit is accessorized with arm bands and visible zippers. The character's posture is upright and relaxed, with arms slightly extended to the sides, suggesting readiness for movement in an urban environment.
description: A modern urban adult with a high ponytail, face mask, hooded sweatshirt, jogger pants, crossbody bag, and high-top sneakers, standing upright and ready for movement.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face mask, high ponytail, crossbody bag, and layered clothing with visible accessories.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, ponytail, arm bands, and the side of the crossbody bag.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the hood, back of the crossbody bag, and the cropped jogger pants with visible sneaker heels.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm accessories, and the side of the bag and pouch.
attribute_clothing_type: urban streetwear with a hooded sweatshirt, jogger pants, fingerless gloves, and a crossbody bag
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly extended
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length hair tied in a high ponytail
